# coolify_cloud_token (Resource)

Manages a Coolify cloud token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "coolify_cloud_token" "example" {
  name           = "my-cloud-token"
  cloud_provider = "hetzner"
  token          = "change-me-in-production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_provider` (String) The cloud provider type. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `name` (String) The name of the cloud token.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The cloud provider token.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud token.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import coolify_cloud_token.example <cloud-token-uuid>
```
